name: RDP Activity
description: Detects Remote Desktop Protocol connections, session management, and authentication. Covers both inbound (LocalSessionManager, RemoteConnectionManager) and outbound (RDPClient) RDP. Key for detecting lateral movement.
author: EventHawk (SANS/Microsoft/Sigma)

event_descriptions.4624: Successful logon — filter LogonType=10 for Remote Interactive (RDP)
event_descriptions.4625: Failed logon — filter LogonType=10 for RDP brute force
event_descriptions.21: Remote Desktop Services: Session logon succeeded
event_descriptions.22: Remote Desktop Services: Shell start notification
event_descriptions.23: Remote Desktop Services: Session logoff succeeded
event_descriptions.24: Remote Desktop Services: Session has been disconnected
event_descriptions.25: Remote Desktop Services: Session reconnection succeeded
event_descriptions.39: Session X disconnected by session Y
event_descriptions.40: Session X connected from session Y
event_descriptions.65: RDP client ActiveX: An error occurred
event_descriptions.131: Server accepted a new TCP connection — contains client IP
event_descriptions.140: Server could not initialize SSL/TLS connection
event_descriptions.1024: RDP ClientActiveX is trying to connect to server
event_descriptions.1149: User authentication succeeded (RemoteConnectionManager) — contains source IP, user, domain
